findings.finding: Task 3 bundles 4 distinct edits (TOC + when_to_use + U1 + R6 frontmatter); partial-completion failure forces rollback of correctly-applied work. Operator chose bundled (recommended).
findings.evidence_quote: Tasks 2 and 3 each bundle 3-4 requirements into one file-touch (lifecycle/SKILL.md gets R1+R2+R4 U4; critical-review/SKILL.md gets R1+R2+R4 U1+R6).

findings.finding: Task 11 bundles three logically distinct backlog edits (R5+R7+178-amendments) with no inter-dependency. Operator chose bundled (recommended).
findings.evidence_quote: Bundling Task 11: R5, R7, and ticket-178 self-amendments are three logically distinct backlog edits but all are docs-only and small.

findings.finding: Task 2 bundles R1+R2+R4 U4 on lifecycle/SKILL.md; U4 grep-locate sentinel drift would discard correctly-applied TOC and when_to_use edits.
findings.evidence_quote: Replace the slugify HOW prose ... locate by content `grep -n "underscores become hyphens, not stripped" skills/lifecycle/SKILL.md`

findings.finding: Task 11's R7 title-substring heuristic ('clarify-critic' AND 'validator') is brittle to phrasing — broadened to also match 'schema' but title still not pinned in plan.
findings.evidence_quote: any('clarify-critic' in i.get('title','').lower() and 'validator' in i.get('title','').lower() for i in d.get('items',[]))

findings.finding: U2 KEEP/DROP binary admits no audit-visible distinction between borderline-default-to-DROP and clear-DROP rows; PR review must re-derive analysis to verify exhaustiveness. Mitigated by optional '# borderline' comment per Verification Strategy update.
findings.evidence_quote: the implementer applies the named-consumer test conservatively

findings.finding: u2-decisions.md tolerates partial writes; Tasks 5-10 must gate on completion sentinel before parsing. Mitigated by sentinel addition.
Task 1's count >= 12 verification gate is severely under-discriminating; per-row exhaustiveness still relies on PR review.
findings.evidence_quote: pass if exit 0 AND count ≥ 12 (at least one decision per corpus file). PR review verifies the per-row exhaustiveness against the actual table contents.

findings.finding: Mirror paths (plugins/cortex-core/skills/...) are not listed in any task's Files field even though pre-commit hook will modify them. Mitigated by explicit treatment in Verification Strategy.
Pre-commit drift hook installation not verified before Task 2 begins. Mitigated by precondition check in Verification Strategy.
findings.evidence_quote: Pre-commit dual-source drift hook: automatic on every commit.
